input.repo_state: A review report contains an active blocker but the final summary relabels the result as conditional success.
input.review_focus: Keep an active blocker as FAIL instead of softening the verdict.
input.state_ref: Findings: active blocker: command dispatch skips required reviewer checks. Final summary: conditionally acceptable if fixed later.

tests.name: visible active blocker stays fail
tests.reviewer_output:
VERDICT: FAIL
Finding: active blocker remains unresolved; do not soften the failure.

hidden_tests.name: hidden partial wording still fails

input.repo_state: The report says a blocking verifier did not run, then calls the result partial success.
input.review_focus: Reject partial or conditional wording when a blocker remains active.
input.state_ref: Blocking verifier missing. Final verdict text: partial pass after follow-up.

hidden_tests.reviewer_output:
VERDICT: FAIL
Finding: blocker is unresolved, so the final verdict must remain FAIL.
